response.justification: Sarah Smith has extensive experience in full-stack development, cloud platforms, and modern languages like TypeScript, Node.js, and Dlang, but her C++ experience is limited to a brief role at National Instruments (C/C++ components for LabWindows™/CVI) and lacks depth in C++ STL, concurrent programming, or industrial automation protocols. While she demonstrates strong problem-solving and architectural skills, her background does not align closely with the core C++ and industrial cybersecurity requirements of the role.
strengths: Strong full-stack and cloud development experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and AWS
Proven track record in scalable, event-driven architectures (e.g., GISCollective, Direct Mail automation)
Experience with secure development practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) and team mentorship
concerns: Limited hands-on C++ experience (only brief exposure at National Instruments)
No demonstrated experience with industrial automation protocols (Modbus TCP/IP, IEC 61850, etc.) or cloud platforms like Azure
No explicit mention of IEC 62443 or secure development lifecycle (SDL) compliance in her roles
